PRODUCT SUMMARY
 
Product ID:           AF0001
Product Name:         Citrus Junliqing
Chinese Name:         柑橘菌立清
Product Types:        Growth Promoter, Microbial Agent, Microbial Fertilizer
 
TARGET CROPS
Chili Pepper, Citrus, Vegetables, Fruit Trees, Melons, Field Crops, Medicinal Herbs, Flowers, Seedlings, Tea Trees
 
TARGET DISEASES
Downy Mildew, Gray Mold, Purple Spot, Anthracnose, Leaf Spot, Wilt, Root Rot, Damping-off, Soft Rot, Ginger Wilt
 
TARGET PESTS
None
 
SYMPTOMS ADDRESSED
yellowing, tip-drying, mosaic, dwarfing
 
ACTIVE INGREDIENTS
Bacillus subtilis, Bacillus licheniformis, Bacillus pumilus, Bacillus gelatinous, Bacillus amyloliquefaciens

Foliar spray
